source.attribution: Böhtlingk, Indische Sprüche №550; Bhartṛhari / Pañcatantra / Hitopadeśa

s1: अयं निजः परो वेति गणना लघुचेतसाम्।
s1dev: अयं निजः परो वेति गणना लघुचेतसाम्।

translation.de: «Dieser ist Einer von den Unsrigen oder ein Fremder», so rechnen Menschen von niederem Sinne; Männer von edler Handlungsweise dagegen betrachten die ganze Erde als ihre Familie.

de.source: Böhtlingk, O., Indische Sprüche, 2nd ed., St. Petersburg 1870–1873

import_meta.iast_reference: ayaṃ nijaḥ paro veti gaṇanā laghucetasām | udāracaritānāṃ tu vasudhaiva kuṭumbakam ||
corrections: German reconstructed from split translation_de + source_attribution fields in the DB
import_meta.note: Text-only feed verse (no audio yet). Sanskrit + German are public domain; scansion verified as clean anuṣṭubh (8/8/8/8) via src/core/translit.js.
